# Sponsorship Yield

> **Type:** Analytics
> **Provenance:** 1P
> **Contexts:** [sponsorship, finance]
> **Measures:** [sponsorship-inventory-and-yield]

## Purpose

Measures monetization efficiency of AXPONA's sponsorship inventory — the fastest-growing revenue line (4.3x since 2018). Demand exceeds supply (heavy SOLD markers). Analytics here identify pricing opportunities: are we leaving money on the table?

## Metrics

| Metric | Formula | Dimensions | Refresh |
|--------|---------|------------|---------|
| **fill_rate** | sold_items / available_items | edition, category, tier | per-edition |
| **cpm_equivalent** | sponsorship_revenue / (attendee_count / 1000) | edition | per-edition |
| **avg_sponsorship_value** | total_sponsorship_revenue / sold_sponsorships | edition, tier | per-edition |
| **renewal_rate** | renewed_sponsors / prior_year_sponsors | edition | per-edition |
| **revenue_growth_yoy** | (current - prior) / prior | edition | per-edition |
| **sell_through_by_category** | sold / available per category | edition, category | per-edition |

## Data Pipeline

```
Bronze                          Silver                          Gold
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Sponsorship tracking      ──▶   dim_sponsor +                ──▶  v_sponsorship_sell_through
(spreadsheet / manual)          fct_sponsorship_delivery           sponsorship_yield_summary
                                sponsorship_package
```

## Benchmarks

| Segment | Target | Signal |
|---------|--------|--------|
| Overall fill rate | >= 90% | Demand exceeds supply — pricing opportunity |
| Premium tier fill | 100% | If premium isn't selling out, pricing is wrong |
| CPM equivalent | Increasing YoY | $19 per 1K attendees (2025) |
| Renewal rate | >= 70% | Sponsor relationships sticky |

## Capabilities

- sponsorship-sell-through-analysis
- yield-optimization-tracking
- pricing-opportunity-identification

## Feedback Loop

- **Measured in:** Sponsorship
- **Consumed by:** Sponsorship (pricing strategy), Event (inventory planning)
- **Drives:** Price increases on high-demand categories, new inventory creation, tier restructuring
- **Maturity path:** descriptive (current) → diagnostic (which categories underperform?) → prescriptive (optimal pricing)

## Related Patterns

- `sponsorship-inventory-and-yield` — the domain pattern being measured
- `maximize-sponsorship-yield` — the goal pattern this analytics supports
